name: optolink
description: Vendored Optolink VS2/P300 engine for the vitohome ESPHome component (derived from bertmelis/VitoWiFi @ edc059a7). Compiled as an in-tree PlatformIO library so its nested source tree survives ESPHome's external-component copier. Provenance: THIRD_PARTY.md / LICENSE.optolink.
